project: Replace TypeScript Daytona Runner with Daytona Go SDK
description: Replace the Node/TypeScript daytona-runner HTTP service with a single Go implementation using the Daytona Go SDK while preserving the existing runner interface and behavior semantics.

userStories.title: Migrate cloud runner environment schema to Daytona SDK variables
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want runtime config to use Daytona SDK environment variables so that workers can connect directly without legacy HTTP runner settings.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/cloud/deploy/config.go removes HAL_CLOUD_RUNNER_URL and HAL_CLOUD_RUNNER_SERVICE_TOKEN fields, constants, and env parsing.
Config adds DAYTONA_API_KEY (required), DAYTONA_API_URL (optional), DAYTONA_SERVER_URL (legacy alias fallback), and DAYTONA_TARGET (optional).
LoadConfig prefers DAYTONA_API_URL and falls back to DAYTONA_SERVER_URL only when DAYTONA_API_URL is unset.
Validate requires valid DB config and non-empty DAYTONA_API_KEY.
internal/cloud/deploy/config_test.go includes passing and failing cases for the new env schema and URL fallback precedence.

userStories.title: Add Daytona Go SDK dependency and SDK client constructor
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want a dedicated SDK runner client constructor so that runner operations are initialized consistently with required Daytona configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/cloud/runner/sdk_client.go defines SDK client config fields APIKey, APIURL, and Target.
Constructor validates APIKey as required and wraps constructor failures using %w.
internal/cloud/runner/sdk_client_test.go verifies constructor validation and wrapped error behavior.

userStories.title: Implement CreateSandbox and DestroySandbox via SDK
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want sandbox lifecycle methods implemented via the SDK so that provisioning and teardown no longer depend on HTTP runner endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: CreateSandbox returns an error when request is nil or request.Image is empty.
DestroySandbox retrieves sandbox via client.Get and deletes it with sandbox.Delete(ctx).
Validation and SDK call failures are wrapped with %w and operation-specific error prefixes.
internal/cloud/runner/sdk_client_test.go includes success and failure tests for CreateSandbox and DestroySandbox.

userStories.title: Implement Exec command execution parity via SDK
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want command execution to preserve existing runner semantics while using Daytona SDK process APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Exec validates required inputs, including non-nil request and required execution fields.
Exec retrieves sandbox with client.Get before execution.
Exec applies options.WithCwd(req.WorkDir) when req.WorkDir is set.
Exec applies options.WithExecuteTimeout(req.Timeout) when req.Timeout is set.
Execution and SDK failures are wrapped with %w and stable operation-specific messages.
internal/cloud/runner/sdk_client_test.go verifies validation paths, error paths, and option application.

userStories.title: Implement StreamLogs via SDK session log API
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want log streaming to come directly from Daytona SDK session command logs so that the runner keeps the existing return shape without HTTP mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Get and log retrieval failures are wrapped with %w and stable operation-specific messages.
internal/cloud/runner/sdk_client_test.go covers successful log retrieval and failure cases.

userStories.title: Implement Health using SDK list probe
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want health checks to validate Daytona reachability through SDK APIs so that runner health reflects direct SDK connectivity.
acceptanceCriteria: On success, Health returns runner.HealthStatus{OK:true, Version:daytona.Version}.
Probe failures are wrapped with %w and operation-specific messages.
internal/cloud/runner/sdk_client_test.go includes health success and failure tests.

userStories.title: Remove HTTP runner implementation and references in runner package
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want the legacy HTTP runner implementation removed so that there is only one supported SDK execution path.
acceptanceCriteria: HTTP-runner-focused tests are removed or replaced by SDK-focused tests.
internal/cloud/runner/runner.go comments no longer mention HTTP implementation.
go test ./internal/cloud/runner/... passes with SDK-only implementation.

userStories.title: Update smoke checks for SDK-direct mode
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want smoke checks to treat empty runner URL as healthy SDK-direct mode so that deployments do not require a separate runner endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/cloud/deploy/smoke.go treats empty runner URL as a synthetic healthy runner result.
Existing behavior for non-empty runner URL remains unchanged.
internal/cloud/deploy/smoke_test.go includes explicit tests for empty URL synthetic health and non-empty URL behavior.

userStories.title: Update deployment manifests and environment documentation
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want deployment configuration updated to SDK-only variables so that compose workflows no longer reference the removed runner service.
acceptanceCriteria: deploy/docker-compose.yml removes related depends_on and HAL_CLOUD_RUNNER_* environment wiring.
Worker service environment includes DAYTONA_API_KEY, DAYTONA_API_URL, and DAYTONA_TARGET.
deploy/.env.example removes HAL_CLOUD_RUNNER_* entries and documents DAYTONA_API_KEY, DAYTONA_API_URL, DAYTONA_SERVER_URL alias fallback, and DAYTONA_TARGET.

userStories.title: Delete TypeScript runner artifacts and complete hard-cut cleanup
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want all obsolete TypeScript runner assets removed so that the repository reflects a single Go-based execution implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Repository-wide search finds no remaining "daytona-runner" references.
Repository-wide search finds no remaining "HAL_CLOUD_RUNNER_" references.

userStories.title: Run required verification suite for release readiness
userStories.description: As a backend/platform engineer, I want the full verification suite to pass so that the SDK-only hard cut is safe to merge.
